'''Anxarta''' was a [[City/Legends|city]] on the northern coast of [[Anai]], on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Lianna/Legends|Lianna]]. It was the location of [[Anxarta Spaceport]], which was mainly used by [[Transport/Legends|transport]] and private [[Starship/Legends|starships]] supplying [[Foodstuff/Legends|foodstuffs]] to the local tourist resorts. [[Sienar Labs]], under the control of [[Sienar Fleet Systems/Legends|Sienar Fleet Systems]], was located at the Spaceport.

==Appearances==
*''[[Mission to Lianna]]''
